prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约847→948→1370→993名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次后移至1370名，2025年明显前移至993名，反弹约377名，显示该校在宁夏理科 生中的报考热度有所回升；该校在宁夏理科组招生计划：2022年31人、2023年39人、2024年33人、2025年40人、2026年40人。2026年计划与2025年持平，未出现 扩招或缩招，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第25名，近年排名稳定在第24–26名区间，属于国内 顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及校园盗摄偷盗问题、数学系毕业生就业困难、复试中歧视本科背景等舆情事件，可能对部分 考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。抖音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，但2026年无明显新增热度数据；第五轮学科评估中，厦门大学拥有A+学科2个 （化学、海洋科学、生物学、统计学），A学科3个（工商管理、应用经济学、教育学、生态学），A-学科5个（法学、数学、理论经济学、社会学、马克思主义理论、化学工程与 技术），学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业持续高热，厦大相关工科试验班（AI与计算机、集成 电路与电子信息）等专业契合当前热门方向。宁夏2026年高考总人数约6.6万人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约6.59万）基本持平，竞争烈度无明显变化。省控线数据2026年缺失，；厦门大学位于福建省，距宁夏较远，属于跨省就读。该校在宁夏招生规模较小（理科40人），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合20 25年位次前移的反弹趋势、2026年招生计划持平、学校声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲、考生总数稳定等因素，预计2026年理科组最低位次在993名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约1 008名，区间857–1159名。

一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI与计算机）
- 会计学（会计、财务、审计）
- 经济学类。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间857–1159名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（857名以内）可重点冲击一档的AI与计算机、会计学等王牌 专业；位次接近区间上限（1159名附近）应以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 847 → 948 → 1370 → 993, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, the ranking moved back to 1370, but in 2025 it significantly advanced to 993, a rebound of about 377 places, indicating a recovery in the popularity of this university among science students in Ningxia. The enrollment plan for the science group in Ningxia: 31 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 40 in 2025, and 40 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 25th, with a stable ranking in the 24–26 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving campus voyeurism and theft incidents, employment difficulties for mathematics graduates, and discrimination against undergraduate backgrounds in re-examinations, which may suppress some students' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, but no significant new heat data for 2026. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xiamen University has 2 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, Statistics), 3 A disciplines (Business Administration, Applied Economics, Education, Ecology), and 5 A- disciplines (Law, Mathematics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Marxist Theory, Chemical Engineering and Technology), with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors continue to be highly popular. Xiamen University's related engineering experimental classes (AI and Computer, Integrated Circuit and Electronic Information) align with current hot directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, basically the same as 2025 (history + physics categories about 65,900), with no significant change in competition intensity. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, far from Ningxia, requiring cross-province study. The enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (40 science students), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking advancement, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the negative reputation but strong disciplinary strength, and the stable total number of candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the 2026 science group will slightly move back from 993. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1008, with a range of 857–1159.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Audit)
- Economics Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit and Electronic Information)
- Mathematics Class
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medicine Health)
- Energy and Power Class
- Science Experimental Class (Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 857–1159, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 857), you can focus on Tier 1 majors such as AI and Computer, Accounting, etc. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 1159), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次恢复至正常水平（285名）、2026年大幅缩招25%导致竞争 加剧、学校声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲等因素，预计2026年文科组最低位次在285名基础上略有前移，预测最低位次约262名，区间212–312名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 282 → 136 → 2623 → 285. In 2024, there was a severe ranking gap (2623), but in 2025 it quickly recovered to 285, roughly the same as 2022, indicating that the normal ranking level for this university among Ningxia liberal arts students is around 280. The enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Ningxia: 14 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and 12 in 2026. The 2026 plan is 4 fewer than 2025 (a 25% reduction), with significantly tightened quotas and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings. It is a top-tier comprehensive university in China, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative,' involving campus safety, employment difficulties, and other public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), but there is no significant new heat data for 2026. The overall negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Related advantageous disciplines in liberal arts: Law A-, Sociology A-, Education A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Theoretical Economics A-, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are relatively popular. Xiamen University's Law, Humanities Experimental Class, etc., align with hot directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is approximately 66,000, with an estimated 21,500 history category candidates, roughly the same as 2025. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, far from Ningxia. The enrollment scale for liberal arts in Ningxia is small (only 12 in 2026), and the geographical factor of studying across provinces has some but not decisive influence on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery of rankings to normal levels in 2025 (285), a significant 25% reduction in enrollment in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the university's negative reputation but strong disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly move forward from 285. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 262, with a range of 212–312.

If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 312), prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Sociology and Public Administration to ensure admission.
